_comment_port: Server listen port (env: CLAW_SERVER_PORT or PORT)
_comment_corsAllowedOrigins: Allowed CORS origins; use ["*"] for development, restrict in production (env: CLAW_SERVER_CORS_ORIGINS, comma-separated)
_comment_gracefulShutdown: Graceful shutdown timeout as Go duration string

ws._comment_readLimitBytes: Maximum incoming WebSocket message size in bytes (64KB default)

rateLimit._comment_messageRate: Maximum messages per second per client
rateLimit._comment_connectionRate: Maximum new connections per minute per pair ID
rateLimit._comment_maxIPsPerPair: Maximum unique source IPs allowed per pair ID
rateLimit._comment_maxClientsPerPair: Maximum concurrent WebSocket clients per pair ID
rateLimit._comment_cleanupInterval: Interval to purge expired rate-limit buckets

pairing._comment_codeLength: Length of generated pairing short codes
pairing._comment_ipRateLimit: Maximum pairing code creates per minute per IP
pairing._comment_cleanupInterval: Interval to purge expired pairing codes
